sqlite-db.name: SQLite Database
sqlite-db.description: Local SQLite database storing menu items, ingredients, recipes, expenses, sales, labor, receipts, and assistant conversations

api-routes.name: Next.js API Routes
api-routes.description: RESTful API endpoints for menu items, ingredients, recipes, categories, expenses, sales, labor, receipts, financials, KPIs, projections

calculations-engine.name: Financial Calculations Engine
calculations-engine.description: Core math: food cost %, profit per item, suggested pricing, daily P&L, prime cost, benchmark analysis

menu-costing-ui.name: Menu Cost Calculator UI
menu-costing-ui.description: Mobile-friendly interface for menu items, ingredients, recipes with cost analysis

ingredient-manager-ui.name: Ingredient Manager UI
ingredient-manager-ui.description: Interface for managing ingredients with pricing

recipe-builder-ui.name: Recipe Builder UI
recipe-builder-ui.description: Interface for building recipes with running cost totals

dashboard-home.name: Dashboard Home Page
dashboard-home.description: Main landing page with quick stats and menu health overview

square-integration.name: Square API Integration
square-integration.description: Sales sync, labor/payroll sync, webhook for auto-inventory deduction

receipt-scanner.name: Receipt Scanner (OpenAI Vision)
receipt-scanner.description: AI-powered receipt scanning with fuzzy ingredient matching and price history tracking

openai-client.name: OpenAI Client
openai-client.description: OpenAI SDK client used for receipt scanning and AI assistant

financials-dashboard.name: P&L & Financials Dashboard
financials-dashboard.description: Full P&L with 12 cost categories, 6 date ranges, drill-down, KPIs, projections, survival score

assistant-chat-api.name: AI Assistant Chat API
assistant-chat-api.description: SSE streaming endpoint that receives user messages, sends to OpenAI with function calling tools, executes tool calls, streams responses

assistant-tools.name: AI Assistant Tool Definitions
assistant-tools.description: OpenAI function calling tool schemas for menu, ingredient, recipe, expense, sales, P&L, KPI, and recommendation operations

assistant-executor.name: AI Assistant Tool Executor
assistant-executor.description: Executes tool calls from OpenAI by running database queries directly (reuses existing API route logic)

assistant-chat-ui.name: AI Assistant Chat UI
assistant-chat-ui.description: Floating action button + slide-up chat panel with message bubbles, action cards, streaming text, and voice input via Web Speech API

assistant-voice-input.name: Voice Input (Web Speech API)
assistant-voice-input.description: Browser-native speech-to-text using Web Speech API. Free, no API costs. Mic button in chat panel.

plaid-integration.name: Plaid / Wells Fargo Bank Connection
plaid-integration.description: Connects to Wells Fargo via Plaid for expense tracking

walmart-import.name: Walmart Business CSV Import
walmart-import.description: Import purchase data from Walmart Business CSV exports
